description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 2

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 15

Components: E, H

You create a small but powerful sphere of spinning wind, ready to target either a creature or a thrown weapon. Either way, you must succeed at a ranged touch attack against the target.

If directed against a creature, the attack deals 2d6 wind damage, knocks the target back 5 ft and has it fall prone.

If directed against a thrown weapon, the technique must be made as a readied action to respond to the weapon being thrown. You can either hinder the weapon, throwing it 2d6x5 ft in a random direction from its intended target (thus making it miss), or aid the attack, having it gain a +4 bonus to the attack roll and having it deal 2d6 additional damage on hit (not multiplied on critical hits). If the touch attack misses the weapon, nothing happens.

You gain a +8 bonus to the touch attack if you are adjacent to the creature or throwing the weapon, or a +4 bonus if you are within 10 ft of them.

Empower: Spend 3 Chakra to either increase the knockback by 5 ft or to target two thrown weapons fired by the same creature, at the same target.
